英文意义: related through family or old ties
example_sentence: 我们是沾亲带故的老乡，见面格外亲切。
example_sentence_en: We are old townsfolk related by family ties, so meeting feels especially warm.

mandarin_意义: 指女子正当青春美好的年纪。
example_sentence: 照片里的母亲当时正是妙龄，笑容明亮。
example_sentence_en: In the photo, Mother was in the prime of her youth, with a bright smile.

example_sentence: 春天的气息随着暖风飘然而至。
example_sentence_en: The breath of spring arrived lightly on the warm breeze.

example_sentence: 母亲去世后，家里一直留着她当年的春装。
example_sentence_en: After Mother passed away, the family kept the spring clothes she once wore.

example_sentence: 读到那封信，她心中又泛起对母亲的追思。
example_sentence_en: Reading that letter, she again felt longing for her mother in her heart.

example_sentence: 提起往事，他眼中泛起泪光。
example_sentence_en: Mentioning the past brought a glisten of tears to his eyes.

example_sentence: 每年清明，他都会去墓前追思母亲。
example_sentence_en: Every Qingming, he goes to the grave to cherish his mother's memory.

example_sentence: 旧物触景，她不免有些惆怅。
example_sentence_en: Old objects stirred memories, leaving her somewhat melancholy.

example_sentence: 她的装束简洁大方，很符合职业女性的气质。
example_sentence_en: Her attire was simple and elegant, fitting a professional woman.
usage_note: Can also be used as a verb in writing.

mandarin_意义: 形容样式新、跟得上时尚。
example_sentence: 这件外套当年很时髦，现在看也不过时。
example_sentence_en: This coat was very fashionable then and still does not look dated.

example_sentence: 她换了一个清爽的发型，整个人精神了许多。
example_sentence_en: She changed to a fresh hairstyle and looked much more energetic.

mandarin_意义: 肚子中间脐带脱落留下的痕迹；肚脐。
example_sentence: 低腰裤流行时，露脐装曾引起不少讨论。
example_sentence_en: When low-rise pants were popular, midriff-baring tops sparked much discussion.

mandarin_意义: 看到某种严重情况而内心震惊。
example_sentence: 浪费如此严重，实在触目惊心。
example_sentence_en: Such serious waste is truly shocking to see.

mandarin_意义: 用公告或询问等方式收集（作品、意见等）。
example_sentence: 杂志社正在征集散文，他投了一篇回忆母亲的文章。
example_sentence_en: The magazine is soliciting essays, and he submitted one about his mother.

mandarin_意义: 把许多文章汇编成的书。
example_sentence: 这本文集收录了作者关于服装与记忆的文字。
example_sentence_en: This anthology collects the author's writings on clothing and memory.

mandarin_意义: 附在正文后面的补充材料。
example_sentence: 附录里附有作者早年照片和衣物尺寸记录。
example_sentence_en: The appendix includes early photos and clothing size records.

example_sentence: 她谈吐从容，让人感受到良好的教养。
example_sentence_en: She speaks with composure, revealing good upbringing.

example_sentence: 面试时穿着得体非常重要。
example_sentence_en: Dressing appropriately is very important in an interview.

example_sentence: 就算款式过时，母亲仍舍不得扔掉那件衣服。
example_sentence_en: Even if the style was dated, Mother still could not bear to throw away that garment.

mandarin_意义: 反复考虑字句是否恰当。
example_sentence: 这篇文章的标题他推敲了很久才定下。
example_sentence_en: He polished the title of this essay for a long time before settling on it.

mandarin_意义: 涂在眼皮上用来突出眼神的化妆品。
example_sentence: 她只淡淡地涂了一点眼影，显得很有精神。
example_sentence_en: She applied only a light touch of eye shadow and looked refreshed.

mandarin_意义: 带灰调的晶亮色泽（多指妆面或面料）。
example_sentence: 这种灰晶色调的眼影很适合日常妆容。
example_sentence_en: This grayish crystal-toned eye shadow suits everyday makeup.

example_sentence: 她挑选了一支淡色唇膏，搭配素雅的春装。
example_sentence_en: She chose a light lipstick to match her simple spring outfit.

example_sentence: 旧照片里母亲的面容温柔而坚定。
example_sentence_en: In the old photo, Mother's face was gentle and firm.

example_sentence: 这件衣服尺码不对，穿着很别扭。
example_sentence_en: The size is wrong, so wearing this garment feels awkward.

mandarin_意义: 借着某事发挥，表达自己的意思。
英文意义: use a topic as a pretext to make a point
example_sentence: 他并非真谈衣服，而是借题发挥谈消费观念。
example_sentence_en: He was not really talking about clothes but using them as a pretext to discuss consumption.

example_sentence: 春装让她看起来格外俏丽。
example_sentence_en: The spring outfit made her look especially pretty.

mandarin_意义: 形容帅气、有型（音译用法）。
example_sentence: 她觉得短发配风衣很酷。
example_sentence_en: She thinks short hair with a trench coat looks cool.

mandarin_意义: 在一定时期流行的风尚。
example_sentence: 时尚变化很快，但经典的款式更耐看。
example_sentence_en: Fashion changes quickly, but classic styles last longer.

example_sentence: 做事也要看时机，顺风时更省力。
example_sentence_en: Timing matters in work; going with the wind takes less effort.

example_sentence: 行业调整期，企业难免要逆风前行。
example_sentence_en: During industry adjustment, companies inevitably move against the wind.

example_sentence: 谈服装，免不了要提到审美和时代。
example_sentence_en: Talking about clothing inevitably involves aesthetics and the times.

英文意义: lost in thought; in a trance
example_sentence: 她望着旧衣出神，仿佛又回到了从前。
example_sentence_en: She gazed at the old clothes, lost in thought, as if back in the past.

example_sentence: 她年轻时的气质清纯，像春天的风一样。
example_sentence_en: Her youthful air was pure, like a spring breeze.

example_sentence: 她尝试把旧衣改成更合身的样式。
example_sentence_en: She tried altering the old garment to a better fit.

英文意义: even to; go so far as to
example_sentence: 这种面料柔软，乃至可以贴身穿着。
example_sentence_en: This fabric is so soft it can even be worn next to the skin.

mandarin_意义: 使人成瘾、危害健康的违禁药物。
example_sentence: 青少年应认清毒品危害，坚决远离。
example_sentence_en: Young people should understand the harm of drugs and stay far away.

example_sentence: 服装记录的不只是样式，也是人生片段。
example_sentence_en: Clothing records not only style but also episodes of life.

example_sentence: 她到工厂体验了一天缝纫工的工作。
example_sentence_en: She spent a day at a factory experiencing a seamstress's work.

mandarin_意义: 使自己进入（某种行列或范围）。
example_sentence: 这个品牌跻身国际时装周，引起关注。
example_sentence_en: The brand joined international fashion weeks and drew attention.

example_sentence: 店员竭诚为顾客挑选合适的尺码。
example_sentence_en: The clerk wholeheartedly helped customers choose the right size.

example_sentence: 长辈的忠告让他重新思考穿衣消费。
example_sentence_en: The elders' sincere advice made him rethink clothing consumption.

example_sentence: 孩子穿上新衣时，脸上满是童真。
example_sentence_en: When the child put on new clothes, his face was full of innocence.

mandarin_意义: 仔细地吃、喝并辨别滋味；引申为体验。
example_sentence: 慢慢品尝一杯茶，也是一种休息。
example_sentence_en: Slowly savoring a cup of tea is also a form of rest.

example_sentence: 这件衣料只有轻微的褶皱，熨一下就好。
example_sentence_en: The fabric has only slight wrinkles; ironing will fix it.

mandarin_意义: 一种被法律禁止的毒品原植物。
example_sentence: 法律严禁种植、贩卖大麻。
example_sentence_en: The law strictly forbids growing or selling cannabis.

mandarin_意义: 活在世上做人（强调人生态度）。
英文意义: live one's life in this world
example_sentence: 在世为人，既要体面，也要节制。
example_sentence_en: Living in this world calls for both dignity and moderation.

example_sentence: 消费可以追求美，但不能越过理性底线。
example_sentence_en: Consumption may pursue beauty but must not cross the line of reason.

mandarin_意义: 从事脑力劳动的上班族。
example_sentence: 许多白领偏爱简洁干练的职业装。
example_sentence_en: Many white-collar workers prefer simple, sharp office wear.

example_sentence: 今年流行宽松型外套。
example_sentence_en: Loose-fit coats are in style this year.

example_sentence: 两种面料的差异主要体现在透气性和手感上。
example_sentence_en: The difference between the two fabrics lies mainly in breathability and feel.

英文意义: look toward; gaze in a direction
example_sentence: 他望去，街头的人潮像潮水一样流动。
example_sentence_en: He looked out; the crowd on the street flowed like a tide.

example_sentence: 薄纱透亮，适合春夏穿着。
example_sentence_en: The gauze is bright and sheer, suitable for spring and summer.

example_sentence: 文章从一件衣服引出许多人生哲理。
example_sentence_en: The essay draws much life philosophy from a single garment.

example_sentence: 母亲的节俭给了他很大的启示。
example_sentence_en: Mother's thrift gave him great enlightenment.

example_sentence: 她打开衣橱，里面挂着各年代的春装。
example_sentence_en: She opened the wardrobe; spring clothes from many years hung inside.

example_sentence: 这件大衣质地厚实，保暖性好。
example_sentence_en: This coat has a thick texture and keeps warm well.

example_sentence: 那种老式盘扣在城里几乎绝迹了。
example_sentence_en: That old-style frog button has nearly vanished in the city.

example_sentence: 裤腿略长，需要改短一寸。
example_sentence_en: The trouser legs are a bit long and need shortening by an inch.

example_sentence: 母亲两鬓已有几缕灰白。
example_sentence_en: There were already a few ashen white strands at Mother's temples.

example_sentence: 裁缝仔细量了她的腰围和肩宽。
example_sentence_en: The tailor carefully measured her waist and shoulders.

example_sentence: 这个小衣橱已经容不下更多冬衣了。
example_sentence_en: This small wardrobe can no longer hold more winter clothes.

example_sentence: 当下的流行未必适合每个人。
example_sentence_en: Current trends may not suit everyone.

example_sentence: 不应随意遗弃还能穿的衣物。
example_sentence_en: One should not casually abandon clothes that are still wearable.

example_sentence: 她羞涩地低头整理衣领。
example_sentence_en: She shyly lowered her head to straighten her collar.

example_sentence: 旧照片让他想起初恋时的青涩。
example_sentence_en: The old photo reminded him of the innocence of first love.

mandarin_意义: 亲眼看到，可作证明；也指见证人。
example_sentence: 这些衣物见证了时代的变迁。
example_sentence_en: These garments witnessed the changes of the times.

mandarin_意义: 洗澡；比喻沉浸在（阳光、春风等）中。
example_sentence: 清晨，她沐浴在柔和的春光里。
example_sentence_en: In the early morning, she basked in the gentle spring light.

mandarin_意义: 社会上流行的风气；俗世。
example_sentence: 不必太在意世俗对穿衣的评价。
example_sentence_en: Do not care too much about worldly judgments on dress.

example_sentence: 军绿风衣曾一度非常流行。
example_sentence_en: Army-green trench coats were once very popular.

example_sentence: 合身的剪裁让她看起来更苗条。
example_sentence_en: A well-fitted cut made her look slimmer.

pinyin: jiǔ niú èr hǔ zhī lì
mandarin_意义: 形容很大的力气或费很大的劲。
example_sentence: 他费了九牛二虎之力，才把旧木箱抬上楼。
example_sentence_en: He used tremendous effort to carry the old wooden chest upstairs.

mandarin_意义: 索取；讨人喜欢（语境相关）。
example_sentence: 这件衣服的颜色很讨人喜欢。
example_sentence_en: The color of this garment is very pleasing.

example_sentence: 他排队很久，才把限量款外套买到手。
example_sentence_en: He queued a long time before getting the limited-edition coat.

example_sentence: 国防绿大衣在八十年代很常见。
example_sentence_en: National-defense-green coats were common in the 1980s.

example_sentence: 军用帆布结实耐磨，曾用于做包和鞋。
example_sentence_en: Military canvas is tough and was used for bags and shoes.

example_sentence: 他背着水壶，继续沿山路前行。
example_sentence_en: He carried a canteen and continued along the mountain path.

example_sentence: 强劲的风把衣架吹得叮当作响。
example_sentence_en: The powerful wind made the clothes rack clatter.

example_sentence: 阔腿裤曾风行一时，后来又悄然退去。
example_sentence_en: Wide-leg pants were once in vogue, then quietly faded.

mandarin_意义: 把自己放在某种环境或境地中。
英文意义: place oneself in; be immersed in
example_sentence: 置身于展厅，仿佛走进了服装史。
example_sentence_en: Placed in the exhibition hall, one seemed to enter the history of dress.

example_sentence: 阅读与旅行都有助于开阔审美。
example_sentence_en: Reading and travel both help broaden one's aesthetic sense.

example_sentence: 潮流会变，但合身与得体始终重要。
example_sentence_en: Trends change, but fit and propriety always matter.

example_sentence: 听到好消息，他整个人昂奋起来。
example_sentence_en: Hearing the good news, he became excited and uplifted.

example_sentence: 她为新学期置备了一套学习用品。
example_sentence_en: She purchased a set of study supplies for the new semester.

mandarin_意义: 浸入；比喻专心于某种境界。
example_sentence: 她沉浸在回忆里，忘了时间。
example_sentence_en: She was immersed in memories and lost track of time.

example_sentence: 评价作品应实事求是，避免溢美之词。
example_sentence_en: Evaluate work realistically and avoid excessive praise.

mandarin_意义: （服装）胸前或下摆张开的幅度。
example_sentence: 这件大衣开度适中，走动更方便。
example_sentence_en: The coat's front opening is moderate, making walking easier.

example_sentence: 她对细节极为讲究。
example_sentence_en: She is extremely particular about details.

example_sentence: 把旧衣说得一文不值，未免有些夸张。
example_sentence_en: Calling old clothes worthless is somewhat exaggerated.

mandarin_意义: 形容走路神气、满不在乎的样子。
example_sentence: 他大摇大摆地走进会议室，旁若无人。
example_sentence_en: He swaggered into the meeting room as if no one else were there.

example_sentence: 前辈提携，让他在事业上少走弯路。
example_sentence_en: Senior mentors' support helped him avoid detours in his career.

example_sentence: 前辈提醒他，穿衣也要符合场合。
example_sentence_en: Seniors reminded him that dress should suit the occasion.

example_sentence: 他感念母亲当年的辛劳与体贴。
example_sentence_en: He recalls with gratitude his mother's past labor and care.

mandarin_意义: 年轻女子（书面或旧式说法）。
example_sentence: 杂志封面上的女郎穿着典雅春装。
example_sentence_en: The young woman on the magazine cover wore elegant spring attire.

example_sentence: 母亲的眼神温柔，像在鼓励他。
example_sentence_en: Mother's gaze was gentle, as if encouraging him.

example_sentence: 在灯光下，面料的纹理凸现出来。
example_sentence_en: Under the light, the fabric's texture stood out clearly.

example_sentence: 他对价格突然上涨感到诧异。
example_sentence_en: He was astonished at the sudden price rise.

example_sentence: 朋友的一句玩笑让他有些不快。
example_sentence_en: A friend's joke left him somewhat displeased.

example_sentence: 往事浮现，像老照片一样清晰。
example_sentence_en: The past emerged as clearly as an old photograph.

example_sentence: 讨论到此为止，就此告一段落。
example_sentence_en: The discussion stops here and comes to a close.

mandarin_意义: 发出声音；说话（多用于否定）。
example_sentence: 他坐在角落里，半天没吱声。
example_sentence_en: He sat in the corner without a word for a long time.

example_sentence: 年轻人并非都抗拒传统服饰元素。
example_sentence_en: Not all young people resist traditional clothing elements.

example_sentence: 毋庸讳言，审美会随时代变化。
example_sentence_en: Needless to say, aesthetics change with the times.

example_sentence: 专家分析了这种消费心理的成因。
example_sentence_en: Experts analyzed the causes of this consumption mindset.

example_sentence: 嫩芽萌发预示着春天已经到来。
example_sentence_en: Sprouting buds presage the arrival of spring.

mandarin_意义: 由液体变成固体；比喻固定不变。
example_sentence: 那一刻，她的笑容仿佛凝固在照片上。
example_sentence_en: At that moment, her smile seemed frozen in the photo.

example_sentence: 春季天气多变，穿衣要方便增减。
example_sentence_en: Spring weather is changeable, so clothing should be easy to layer.

example_sentence: 他没预料到这件旧衣会这么合身。
example_sentence_en: He did not expect the old garment to fit so well.

mandarin_意义: 来到（多指重大事物或时刻）。
example_sentence: 春天悄然降临，街道换上了浅色衣裳。
example_sentence_en: Spring quietly arrived, and the streets put on lighter colors.

example_sentence: 她的声音微颤，却仍旧把故事讲完。
example_sentence_en: Her voice trembled slightly, yet she still finished the story.

example_sentence: 劲风掀起衣角，他抓紧了围巾。
example_sentence_en: A strong wind lifted the hem of his coat, and he gripped his scarf.

example_sentence: 这笔开销相当于他半个月的生活费。
example_sentence_en: This expense amounted to half a month's living costs.

example_sentence: 名牌服饰有时会产生炫耀效应。
example_sentence_en: Brand-name clothing sometimes produces a show-off effect.

example_sentence: 轻飘的雪落在衣肩上，立刻融化。
example_sentence_en: Light snow fell on his shoulders and melted at once.

example_sentence: 夜色诡谲，街灯在风里摇晃。
example_sentence_en: The night was eerie and unpredictable; streetlamps swayed in the wind.

example_sentence: 她的穿着朴素，却很干净得体。
example_sentence_en: Her attire was simple yet clean and proper.

example_sentence: 合理的饮食比盲目追求时髦更重要。
example_sentence_en: A sensible diet matters more than blindly chasing fashion.

example_sentence: 他在俗世中仍保留对美的敏感。
example_sentence_en: He kept a sensitivity to beauty amid the secular world.

example_sentence: 他的处理稳妥周到，无可责备。
example_sentence_en: His handling was steady and thorough, beyond reproach.

example_sentence: 变化甚或影响到日常穿着习惯。
example_sentence_en: The change even affected everyday dressing habits.

example_sentence: 多读经典有助于提高语言表达能力。
example_sentence_en: Reading classics helps improve language expression.

example_sentence: 合适的着装可以提升个人气质。
example_sentence_en: Appropriate dress can elevate one's bearing.

example_sentence: 一束花能为房间增添情趣。
example_sentence_en: A bouquet adds charm to a room.

example_sentence: 理性消费有助于形成良性习惯。
example_sentence_en: Rational consumption helps form positive habits.

mandarin_意义: 把郁结的情绪释放出来。
example_sentence: 写作是他宣泄情感的一种方式。
example_sentence_en: Writing is one way he vents his feelings.

example_sentence: 夕阳把窗前的衣架染成金色。
example_sentence_en: The setting sun dyed the clothes rack by the window golden.

example_sentence: 他养了一只猫，在家写作时有它作伴。
example_sentence_en: He keeps a cat for company while writing at home.

example_sentence: 浅色春装让人看起来更有活力。
example_sentence_en: Light spring clothes make one look more energetic.

example_sentence: 父母的关爱是孩子成长的重要支持。
example_sentence_en: Parental care is vital support for a child's growth.

mandarin_意义: 最下面的一层；比喻社会下层。
example_sentence: 他关注底层劳动者的穿衣需求。
example_sentence_en: He cares about the clothing needs of workers at the grassroots.

example_sentence: 这件事值得我们深思。
example_sentence_en: This matter is worth deep reflection.

example_sentence: 慢慢体味，才能读懂文字背后的情感。
example_sentence_en: Only by savoring slowly can one read the emotion behind the words.

example_sentence: 松糕鞋曾流行一时，后来逐渐少见。
example_sentence_en: Platform shoes were once trendy but later became rare.

mandarin_意义: 传统戏曲故事，强调母亲教子。
英文意义: San Niang Teaches Her Son (opera story)
example_sentence: 文中提到三娘教子，借以说明家庭教育的重要。
example_sentence_en: The text mentions this story to illustrate the importance of family education.

mandarin_意义: 指对性观念的开放与反思（学术语境）。
example_sentence: 课文在学术语境中谈到性解放思潮。
example_sentence_en: The lesson discusses the idea of sexual liberation in an academic context.

mandarin_意义: 指改革开放后成长起来的一代年轻人。
example_sentence: 新新人类的审美与传统长辈有所不同。
example_sentence_en: The aesthetics of this generation differ from those of older relatives.

example_sentence: 小时候他穿过一条毛蓝布裤子。
example_sentence_en: As a child he once wore trousers of rough blue cotton.

mandarin_意义: 裤脚张开像喇叭的裤子。
example_sentence: 喇叭裤在上世纪七十年代非常流行。
example_sentence_en: Bell-bottoms were very popular in the 1970s.

mandarin_意义: 行动缓慢的软体动物；比喻慢节奏。
